title: corydalis heterocarpa
intro: Corydalis heterocarpa is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia, belonging to the family Papaveraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties, due to the presence of alkaloids such as tetrahydropalmatine and protopine. The health benefits of corydalis include pain relief, reduced anxiety and insomnia, and improved cardiovascular function. In herbal preparations, corydalis is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of teas, tinctures, or capsules, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
